shortDescription.en: Danish open-faced rye sandwich topped with pickled herring, onion, dill, and sauce.
shortDescription.zh: 丹麦黑麦开放三明治，上面铺腌鲱鱼、洋葱、莳萝和酱。
shortDescription.nl: Deense open roggebroodsnede met ingelegde haring, ui, dille en saus.

cookingProfile.en: It is cold, briny, and bread-based, more like a composed lunch toast than a fish platter.
cookingProfile.zh: 冷食、咸鲜、以面包为底，更像组合午餐吐司而非鱼拼盘。
cookingProfile.nl: Koud, zilt en broodgericht, meer lunchtoast dan visplank.

description.en: A classic Danish smørrebrød variant with herring as the main topping.
description.zh: 经典丹麦开放三明治变体，以鲱鱼为主料。
description.nl: Een klassieke Deense smørrebrødvariant met haring als topping.

orderVerdict.en: Order if pickled herring on rye sounds appealing; avoid if briny fish is not your thing.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢黑麦面包配腌鲱鱼时适合；不爱咸鲜腌鱼则避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Bestel als haring op rogge je aanspreekt; vermijd bij afkeer van zilte vis.

shortDescription.en: Norwegian toast with caramel-brown brunost cheese, often paired with jam or fruit.
shortDescription.zh: 挪威吐司配焦糖棕色 brunost 奶酪，常配果酱或水果。
shortDescription.nl: Noorse toast met karamelbruine brunost, vaak met jam of fruit.

cookingProfile.en: Expect a sweet-salty caramel dairy flavor, more unusual than regular cheese toast.
cookingProfile.zh: 预期是甜咸焦糖乳香，比普通奶酪吐司更特别。
cookingProfile.nl: Zoet-zoute karamelzuivelsmaak, ongebruikelijker dan gewone kaastosti.

description.en: A Norwegian cafe/breakfast item built around distinctive brown cheese.
description.zh: 挪威咖啡馆/早餐小食，核心是特色棕奶酪。
description.nl: Een Noors café- of ontbijtgerecht rond bruine kaas.

orderVerdict.en: Worth trying if caramel-like cheese sounds fun; skip if sweet cheese feels odd.
orderVerdict.zh: 如果对焦糖感奶酪好奇值得尝；不接受甜奶酪则避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Leuk om te proberen als karamelachtige kaas je aanspreekt; sla over bij zoete kaas.
